name: RGB Cycle
description: Rounded corners and a window border painted as a full colour wheel wrapped around the frame, slowly rotating. The classic gaming-rig ring. Set the speed to zero for a still rainbow. Width, corner radius, cycle speed, rainbow count, saturation and brightness are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Cycle speed
parameters.description: How many full colour rotations play per second, where 0 freezes the rainbow

parameters.name: Rainbow count
parameters.description: How many full rainbows wrap around the frame at once
